title: National Essay Competition 2026: AI in Nigerian Education
description: Applications are now open for the annual National Essay Competition. This year's theme focuses on 'The Role of Artificial Intelligence in Transforming Nigeria's Education System.' Students nationwide are encouraged to submit their entries before the April 15th deadline for a chance to win grand prizes and scholarships.

title: JAMB 2026: New Registration Guidelines Released
description: The Joint Admissions and Matriculation Board (JAMB) has announced updated biometric and profile code generation requirements for the 2026 UTME. All candidates must ensure their NIN is linked to a functional mobile number before starting the registration process to avoid technical delays.

title: Yabatech Updates: New Regulations on Student Conduct
description: Yaba College of Technology management has released a fresh circular regarding student dressing and campus conduct. The new regulations aim to maintain professional standards within the college environment. Students are advised to visit their departmental boards for full details on the approved dress codes.

title: NIN Modification: How to Correct Name and DOB Errors
description: Are you facing issues with your JAMB profile due to NIN errors? Big Quams Media offers expert guidance on the NIN modification process. Learn how to legally update your name, date of birth, or phone number at approved NIMC centers to ensure your admission process remains smooth.

title: Top 10 High-Demand Courses for 2026 Admissions
description: Choosing the right course is as important as choosing the right school. Our latest analysis highlights high-demand fields like Data Science, Nursing, and Education-Mathematics. Discover which courses offer the best career prospects in the current Nigerian job market and how to meet their cut-off marks.

title: Scholarship Alert: Federal Government Bilateral Education Agreement
description: The Honorable Minister of Education has invited interested Nigerians to participate in the 2026/2027 Bilateral Education Agreement (BEA) Scholarship Awards. This opportunity covers both undergraduate and postgraduate studies in various countries. Visit our support center for application assistance.

title: Effective Study Habits for Post-UTME Excellence
description: Success in Post-UTME requires more than just reading; it requires strategy. Learn how to use past questions effectively, manage your time during CBT exams, and master the specific formats used by top universities like UNILAG, LASU, and UI. Start your preparation with Big Quams Media today.

title: Big Quams Media: Digital Services Portal Now Fully Operational
description: We are proud to announce that our multidisciplinary media platform is now fully equipped to handle all your digital needs. From school fee payments and result checking to professional graphic design and web development, we are your one-stop shop for campus and tech solutions.

title: Understanding the CAPS Admission Status: 'Admission in Progress'
description: What does it mean when your JAMB CAPS shows 'Admission in Progress' or 'Recommended'? We break down the technical terms used in the admission portal so you can stay informed about your status and know exactly when to accept your admission offer.

title: Mental Health and the Nigerian Student: Balancing Life and Books
description: The academic journey can be stressful, especially with long-distance challenges and high expectations. In this feature, we discuss practical ways to maintain mental well-being while pursuing your degree. Remember, your health is the foundation of your academic success.
